Title: Custom Blue Square Design T-Shirt - Unique Color Code Apparel
Description:
Showcase your style with this custom-designed t-shirt. The bold, vibrant blue square features a color code graphic (#3a98bb and #fff) that adds a unique, modern aesthetic to your wardrobe.

This tee is perfect for graphic design enthusiasts, art students, or anyone who appreciates minimalist, conceptual apparel. It makes an excellent conversation starter and a memorable gift.

Product Details & Comfort

  • Material: (Assuming a soft, breathable cotton blend based on typical mockup usage.) Crafted from a premium, comfortable fabric blend that feels great all day long.
  • Fit: Designed for a modern, unisex fit, providing comfort and versatility for all body types.
  • Design: The crisp, rectangular graphic is screen-printed on a solid, contrasting blue background, ensuring excellent vibrancy and durability.

Sizing & Care

We offer a comprehensive range of sizes to ensure the perfect fit, with detailed measurements provided in the sizing chart. Please review the size guide carefully, noting that measurements may vary slightly due to manufacturing tolerances.

  • Care Instructions: Machine wash cold with like colors. Tumble dry low or hang to dry for best longevity.
  • Style Use: Ideal for casual outings, streetwear looks, festivals, or themed events. Pair it with distressed jeans, joggers, or shorts for an effortlessly cool ensemble.
